title: ANZSRC 2020 FoR Division 45 Indigenous studies groups
authority: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Stats NZ, Australian Research Council, and New Zealand Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment
scope: All 20 group-level codes under ANZSRC 2020 Fields of Research Division 45 Indigenous studies. This Australia and New Zealand R&D classification is used as a contextual Indigenous axis because Division 52 Psychology explicitly routes Indigenous psychology to Division 45. Registration does not imply that every Indigenous studies group is a psychology subfield.
notes: The full Division 45 group inventory is preserved to avoid reducing Indigenous psychology to health-only or society-only categories. Relevance and entity decisions remain separate from candidate registration.
